title: Middle Eastern Falafel Bowl
description: A flavorful and refreshing bowl filled with crispy falafel, sweet dates, and crunchy lettuce served over a bed of rice.
instructions: Cook the white rice according to package instructions.
Chop the lettuce and cucumber into small pieces.
Slice the pita bread into smaller pieces.
Warm the tahini sauce in a small pan over low heat.
Assemble the falafel bowls by placing a scoop of cooked rice at the bottom, followed by a few pieces of falafel, some chopped lettuce and cucumber, and a drizzle of tahini sauce.
Serve immediately and garnish with chopped fresh parsley and a squeeze of lemon juice.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
